mapper.select: select from tag where name = #{name} limit 1
select t.name as name, count(*) as use_count from post_tag pt join tag t on pt.tag_id = t.id group by t.id, t.name order by use_count desc, t.id asc limit #{limit}

select t.name as name, coalesce(cnt.use_count, 0) as use_count from tag t left join ( select tag_id, count(*) as use_count from post_tag group by tag_id ) cnt on t.id = cnt.tag_id where t.name like concat(#{q}, '%') order by cnt.use_count desc, t.id asc limit #{limit}
